title: ReSaplingSlayer
description: ReSaplingSlayer is a practical Minecraft Forge mod that adds an enchantment to shears, allowing them to drop saplings and destroy leaves with a right-click.
body:
SaplingSlayer mod is now updated for Minecraft 1.20.1!

ReSaplingSlayer

ReSaplingSlayer is a simple yet practical Minecraft Forge mod. It adds a special enchantment to shears. When players use shears with this enchantment to right-click on leaves, the corresponding sapling will automatically drop, and the leaf block will be destroyed.

Main Features:

  • Enchantment Name: ReSapling Slayer
  • Enchantment Effect: When using shears enchanted with ReSapling Slayer to right-click on leaves, the leaves will drop the corresponding sapling and be destroyed.

Configuration Options:

  • Tradeable or not
  • Whether it is a curse
  • Treasure only
  • Rarity (Common, Uncommon, Rare, Very Rare)
  • Can be found in loot
  • Allowed on books
  • Shear durability consumption percentage when harvesting
